```{r VC associated sepsis table}
q <- sepsis_rate_quartiles |> select(c(CVC_D, PVC_D))

tibble(
  name = c(trnsl$vcSepsisTable$CvcAssociated, trnsl$vcSepsisTable$PvcAssociated),
  !!trnsl$sepsisTable$NoOfInfections := total_sepses |> select(c(CVC, PVC)) |> unlist(),
  !!trnsl$globalTable$PooledMean := total_sepsis_rates |> select(c(CVC_D, PVC_D)) |> unlist(),
  !!trnsl$globalTable$Q1 := q |> slice(1) |> unlist(),
  !!trnsl$globalTable$Median := q |> slice(2) |> unlist(),
  !!trnsl$globalTable$Q3 := q |> slice(3) |> unlist()) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "name") |>
  tab_options(table.width = pct(100)) |>
  tab_header(title = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$Header) |>
  tab_row_group(label = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$VcAssociation, rows = 1:2) |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = trnsl$sepsisTable$NoOfInfections, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$vcAssociatedIncidenceRate,
    columns = c(trnsl$globalTable$PooledMean, trnsl$globalTable$Q1, trnsl$globalTable$Median, trnsl$globalTable$Q3),
    id = "incidence_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_stub()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      cell_borders(sides = "right", weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_row_groups(),
      cells_column_labels()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(paste(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        trnsl$vcSepsisTable$CvcAssociatedIncidenceRate,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        trnsl$vcSepsisTable$NumberOfCvcAssociatedInfections,
        "}}{\\text{",
        trnsl$vcSepsisTable$SumOfCvcDays,
        "}} \\times 1 000$$"
      ),
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        trnsl$vcSepsisTable$PvcAssociatedIncidenceRate,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        trnsl$vcSepsisTable$NumberOfPvcAssociatedInfections,
        "}}{\\text{",
        trnsl$vcSepsisTable$SumOfPvcDays,
        "}} \\times 1 000$$"
        ),
      sep = "\\n")),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "incidence_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$PooledMeanFootnote,
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = trnsl$globalTable$PooledMean)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$Q1Footnote,
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = trnsl$globalTable$Q1)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$MedianFootnote,
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = trnsl$globalTable$Median)
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = trnsl$vcSepsisTable$Q3Footnote,
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = trnsl$globalTable$Q3)
  )

```
